ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123-4567890-9876543 has shipped
ham.body:
Hi [FirstName],

Good news! Your order from Amazon has shipped and is on its way. You can track the delivery status by clicking <URL>.

Order Details:
• Item: Echo Dot (4th Gen)
• Quantity: 1
• Price: $49.99
• Shipping Address: 123 Maple Street, Springfield, IL 62704

Estimated Delivery: 3-5 business days

If you have any questions or need to modify delivery options, please contact our Customer Service team.

Thank you for shopping with Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Experience

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Crypto Wallet Suspended – Verify Now
spam.body:
Dear [FirstName],

We regret to inform you that your crypto wallet (ID: 0xABCD1234EF) has been temporarily suspended due to suspicious activity detected on your account. To restore full access and prevent any potential loss of funds, you must verify your identity immediately.

Please click <URL> to confirm your account details. Failure to complete verification within 24 hours will result in permanent suspension and possible loss of your assets.

We understand the urgency and are here to help. If you have any questions, contact our support team at support@<URL>.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,
CryptoSecure Team
